name: Cleanaway Waste Management Limited
analysis: CWY's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.3900, stop A$2.2869, target A$2.6629 (2.65:1) — then trail it.
